body:
VERDICT: APPROVE the SMTIS normalizer's safety spine. CONDITIONAL on tightening redaction (N1/N2) before SMTIS P1 live sensor ingest. Full record: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_SMTIS_NORMALIZER_AUDIT_2026-06-14.md.

This closes the second queued audit (review_20260614T003826Z item 3).

SPINE = PASS (defense-in-depth confirmed):
- normalizer hardcodes audit.safe_for_action=False (literal, line 80); raw feed's audit/mode/confidence never trusted.
- bridge prediction_record_from_smtis is fail-closed: admits only audit.get('safe_for_action', True) is False; missing/ambiguous/True => refused. Unknown mode => refused. Verified by the bridge spoof test.
- mode whitelist consistent (LIVE/SIMULATION/REPLAY -> WAKE/LIMINAL/DREAM).
- fail-safe on non-Mapping input (confidence 0.0, degraded, invalid_input True, safe_for_action False) - verified.
- 17 tests green.

FINDINGS (your lane - code patches; PatchPlan requested):
- N1 (MEDIUM): _SENSITIVE_KEYS redaction is EXACT-match only. Verified live: Authorization redacted, but api_key and access_token passed through UNREDACTED. Variants that slip: api_key, apikey, x-api-key, access_token, refresh_token, bearer, cookie, session_id, auth. FIX: normalized substring match -> any(s in clean_key.lower().replace('-','_') for s in _SENSITIVE_KEYS); add key, auth, bearer, cookie, session to the set.
- N2 (LOW-MED): full raw payload is embedded verbatim as source_inputs[0].raw, so value-level secrets in innocuously-named fields survive. Verified: {'note':'bearer sk-LEAK-in-value'} preserved intact into the record (flows to Urbi/Dream/persistence). FIX (preferred): do NOT embed full raw; keep extracted observations + a sha256 digest of raw for provenance. Alt: value-level secret-shape scan in _json_safe.
- N3 (LOW, tests): test_smtis_normalizer.py asserts redaction for the single exact-match 'token' case only (false confidence). Add api_key / access_token / value-level cases so N1/N2 can't regress.

RISK CONTEXT: bounded - live Signal-K/AIS listeners are stop-gated, so N1/N2 are not currently exploitable; this is pre-P1 hardening. The action-safety invariant itself is correct and double-enforced.

STANDING CONDITION: close N1+N2 before enabling SMTIS P1 live sensor ingest. I did not edit the module (Auditor-Scribe, patch-light).
forbidden_actions: enable SMTIS P1 live sensor ingest before N1+N2 closed
live Signal-K/AIS listeners without user approval
objective: Close the queued SMTIS normalizer audit; route redaction-hardening PatchPlan
requested_output: PatchPlan: N1 normalized-substring redaction; N2 drop full-raw embed (observations + sha256 digest) or value-scan; N3 regression tests. Keep safe_for_action invariant + bridge fail-closed unchanged.
summary: APPROVE SMTIS normalizer safety spine (safe_for_action hardcoded False + bridge fail-closed, 17 tests green). Redaction is the weak spot: N1 exact-key-match leaks api_key/access_token (verified), N2 full-raw embed leaks value-level secrets (verified), N3 thin test coverage. All Codex-lane code patches; close N1+N2 before SMTIS P1 live ingest.
